home.heroTitle: Find a worker for any task in Armenia
home.heroSubtitle: Post a task — workers will contact you directly. Verified by phone, with no fees or middlemen.
home.noTasks: No listings yet. Be the first!

create.title: Post a task
create.subtitle: This section is for those looking to hire a worker. Describe the task and leave your phone number — workers will call you.
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what needs to be done...
create.authPrompt: Your listing is saved as a draft. Verify your phone number to publish it.
create.codeSent: We sent an SMS code to this number.
create.codeError: Could not verify the phone number. Check the code and try again.
create.codeLockError: Too many wrong codes. Try again tomorrow.
create.smsLimitError: Today's SMS limit is reached. Please try later.
create.cooldownError: The code was already sent. Wait a minute and try again.
create.limitError: Maximum 3 active listings per phone number

account.title: My listings
account.loginHint: Log in by phone while creating a listing, and your account will appear here.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Specify what needs to be done, the budget, and leave your phone number.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Your listing appears on the board. Interested workers will reach out.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Discuss the details by phone and choose the best worker.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.collectText: Phone number, task description, and budget — only what you enter yourself.
privacy.retentionText: 7 days. After that, data is automatically deleted.
privacy.sharingText: We do not share your data with third parties.
privacy.deleteText: Click the "Delete" button on your listing card.
